en.extract:
The black-capped speirops (Zosterops lugubris) is a species of bird in the family Zosteropidae. It was previously placed in the genus Speirops. It is endemic to São Tomé in São Tomé and Príncipe.

The '''black-capped speirops''' ('''''Zosterops lugubris''''') is a species of bird in the family [[Zosteropidae]]. It was previously placed in the genus ''[[Speirops]]''. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[São Tomé]] in [[São Tomé and Príncipe]].<ref name="iucn status 15 November 2021" />
